overview.description: The PGIM S&P 500 Max Buffer ETF - August (PMAU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one year period. The exposure is reset annually in August PMAU was launched on Jul 31, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.
